scripts.docker:build:frontend: docker-compose up -d --build frontend || (docker-compose down && docker-compose up -d --build frontend)
scripts.docker:prune: docker-compose down -v --rmi all --remove-orphans && docker volume prune -f
scripts.test: bun run --cwd services/games test && bun run --cwd services/wallets test && bun run --cwd frontend test
scripts.test:e2e: bun run --cwd services/games test:e2e && bun run --cwd services/wallets test:e2e
